subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Desired One! Thy letter was received and, despite lack of time, such was the intensity of love that an immediate reply was penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت مقصود نامه تو رسید و از شدت محبت با عدم فرصت فورا جواب مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
